error.unsupported_firmware: Device does not support the ALLNET JSON API. Check firmware version.

reauth_confirm.description: The ALLNET device at {host} rejected the stored credentials. Enter new credentials.
reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate ALLNET

data_description.device_profile: Select the device type, or leave on Auto to detect automatically.
data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of the ALLNET device.
data_description.password: The password for the ALLNET web interface, if authentication is enabled.
data_description.use_ssl: Enable this if the ALLNET device is configured for HTTPS.
data_description.username: The username for the ALLNET web interface, if authentication is enabled.
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable this to allow self-signed or untrusted SSL certificates.

data_description.device_profile: Select the device type, or leave on Auto to detect automatically.
data_description.password: Password if authentication is enabled on the device.
data_description.username: Username if authentication is enabled on the device.
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable this to allow self-signed or untrusted SSL certificates.

zeroconf_confirm.description: Do you want to add the ALLNET device **{name}** at {host}?
zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered ALLNET device
